source_jobs.title: AI Agent Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US:

At Applied Labs, we are building frontier AI agents and AI applications for growing businesses. We are at an inflection point for AI applications where every company can now get real, significant impact.



We are obsessed with helping our customers deliver exceptional customer experiences with AI agents and humans in the loop. We help teams save time and redirect efforts to build their brand's best customer experiences.



As a rapidly growing team with offices in New York backed by tier-1 VCs and angels, we are seeking talented, driven individuals to join us in our mission.






THE ROLE:

We are growing rapidly and looking for a AI Agent Product Manager to join our team.



The ideal candidate will have a passion for driving impact & outcomes in a fast-paced environment. They must possess strong first principles problem solving, move extremely fast, embody scrappiness and seek high ownership.



In this role, you will be responsible for driving excellence and delivery for our customers across product, customer success and operations.



Build AI products from 0 → 1
As an AI Agent Product Manager at Applied Labs, you will work directly with engineers and customers to define, build, and launch AI-powered products that transform how businesses engage with their customers.



Partner with customers
You’ll spend time with customers to deeply understand their workflows, challenges, and needs—translating these into requirements and solutions. You’ll demo products, gather feedback, and ensure we’re building what truly moves the needle.



Drive the roadmap
You’ll own the roadmap for core AI products, balancing technical tradeoffs with customer value. You’ll prioritize ruthlessly, define clear success metrics, and ensure our team ships with quality and speed.



Bridge technical and business worlds
You’ll communicate complex technical concepts to both engineers and non-technical stakeholders, ensuring alignment from leadership to frontline users.



Be hands-on in execution
This is not just a strategy role—you’ll roll up your sleeves to handle edge cases, write PRDs, test features, and work through ambiguity to deliver real outcomes.






WHAT WE OFFER:

 - Comprehensive health benefits, including medical, dental, and vision insurance

 - Competitive salary and equity package

 - Flexible (Unlimited) Paid Time Off

 - Free lunch! (who said there wasn't such a thing as free lunch)




MINIMUM REQUIREMENTS:

 - 2+ years of experience in product, engineering and/or consulting

 - Excellent communication skills cross-functionally and with customers

 - Technical degree in computer science, engineering, or related field

 - High ownership mentality

 - Obsessed with earning customer love and doing what’s most impactful for our customers

 - Move fast and handle ambiguous problems well biasing towards decisive action and driving clear outcomes / KPIs.




IDEAL REQUIREMENTS:

 - Experience at an early stage, high growth startup

 - Background in AI/ML products or developer platforms



We are looking for individuals who can contribute to our mission of building the highest quality and most reliable AI agents. If you're excited about the challenge of building AI products with real impact, we encourage you to apply.

source_jobs.title: Founding Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About us

 - At Applied Labs, we’re building the platform for reliable AI agents that automate complex work. We are primarily an in-person company based in New York City.

Why this could be a fit

 - Trajectory: 10x growth in 4 months; strong momentum.

 - Ownership: High autonomy; own systems end‑to‑end.

 - Challenging problems: Design novel, reliable solutions for complex tasks.

 - Team quality: Early team from Harvard, MIT, Gemini, Meta.

What you’ll do

 - Own core agent systems from idea to production: orchestration, tool‑use, planning, memory, evals.

 - Architect for reliability: design agent loops and guardrails that hold up under real‑world edge cases.

 - Ship fast, learn faster: run experiments, measure outcomes, iterate weekly.

 - Collaborate tightly with the founders in NYC to set product direction, quality bars, and engineering culture.

 - Set the blueprint: your design decisions, documents, and code style become the standard for future hires.

You might thrive in this role if you:

 - Have shipped production systems end‑to‑end and love owning outcomes.

 - Care deeply about reliability, not just demos - tests, evals, and metrics matter to you.

 - Are product‑minded: you ask “what does the user need?” and then build the simplest thing that works.

 - Prefer in‑person collaboration and fast decision cycles.

 - Want to help define the engineering culture at a company that’s scaling quickly.

Our tools

 - We currently build with Python, Go, React, Clickhouse, K8s, Bazel, Postgres, GCP, Modal

 - We hire for ability, not checklists.

Compensation & benefits

 - Competitive salary + significant equity

 - Flexible (Unlimited) Paid Time Off

 - Medical, Dental, and Vision benefits for you and your family

 - Fancy lunches (think Nubiani), as well as snacks, coffee, or boba that always hits the spot

 - Relocation support to NYC if needed.

Apply

 - Send a short note and your LinkedIn/GitHub to careers@appliedlabs.com (or apply on our site).

source_jobs.title: Design Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

At Applied Labs, we’re building the platform for reliable AI agents that automate complex work. We are primarily an in-person company based in New York City.


WHY THIS COULD BE A FIT

 - Trajectory: 10x growth in 4 months; strong momentum

 - Ownership: High autonomy; own outcomes end to end

 - Challenging problems: Build high-craft experiences that explain complex AI simply

 - Team quality: Early team from Harvard, MIT, Gemini, Meta

 - Speed and taste: Move fast without lowering the bar


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own the Applied Labs web and brand surfaces from concept to production, including marketing site, landing pages, launch pages, and lightweight interactive storytelling

 - Design and build directly in code, translating high-fidelity design into production-quality UI with excellent typography, layout, motion, accessibility, and performance

 - Create reusable components and templates that raise consistency and speed across the website and brand experiences

 - Build and maintain a high-quality pipeline for on-brand design assets, including images, short-form video, motion graphics, and illustrations

 - Use modern AI tools to accelerate output and iteration, including coding agents and generative image and video models, while maintaining a strong human taste and QA bar

 - Partner closely with founders in NYC to set the quality bar for how Applied Labs looks, feels, and communicates, and to execute quickly on new narratives, experiments, and launches

 - Establish the standard for future hires through your documentation, component patterns, asset specs, and creative workflow


YOU MIGHT THRIVE IN THIS ROLE IF YOU

 - Have shipped polished, customer-facing web experiences and can point to real work in production

 - Are fluent in both design and frontend implementation, and you prefer eliminating handoffs by owning the whole loop

 - Care deeply about craft details, including typography, spacing, responsiveness, motion, and interaction feel

 - Can prototype quickly, validate with real feedback, and iterate without losing coherence or quality

 - Use AI tools effectively to speed up coding and creative production, and you can critique and refine outputs rather than accepting them as-is

 - Are product-minded and narrative-driven, and you ask what the user needs to understand, feel, and do next

 - Prefer in-person collaboration and fast decision cycles


BONUS POINTS

 - Experience building or extending a design system in code

 - Comfort with animation and micro-interactions, including motion guidelines and implementation

 - Strong writing and editorial taste for landing page messaging and information architecture

 - Experience producing brand assets using generative image and video workflows while keeping results consistent and on-brand


COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary + significant equity

 - Flexible (Unlimited) Paid Time Off

 - Medical, Dental, and Vision benefits for you and your family

 - Fancy lunches, plus snacks, coffee, or boba

 - Relocation support to NYC if needed


APPLY

Send a short note, portfolio links, and your LinkedIn/GitHub to careers@appliedlabs.com (or apply on our site).

notes: AI-focused startup with strong growth momentum
